# Fajardo Elite International Dance Academy

Davie's social dance academy. Salsa, Bachata, Latin Hustle, Cha-Cha, Merengue, and wedding choreography in Broward County, Florida. Group classes, private lessons, and performance teams taught by champion social dancers.

## Identity

- **Name:** Fajardo Elite International Dance Academy (also "Fajardo Elite Dance Academy", historically "Elite International Dance Academy")
- **Category:** Social dance academy (NOT a ballroom-focused studio)
- **Location:** 6692 Stirling Rd, Davie, FL 33024 — Broward County, South Florida
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- **Website:** https://fajardoelite.com/
- **Email:** fajardoelitedance@gmail.com
- **Phone — Speak with Alex:** (954) 931-5903 — group classes, memberships, general info
- **Phone — Speak with Billy:** (954) 560-7068 — private lessons, wedding consultations, competition coaching
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/fajardoelitedanceacademy
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/EliteIntDance

## Positioning

Fajardo Elite is positioned as Davie's home for **social dancing** — the dances people actually do at parties, weddings, and South Florida nights out. Distinct from competition-ballroom studios (Arthur Murray, Goldcoast Ballroom) and from Latin-only studios (Casa Salsa Davie). The academy teaches the full social-dance repertoire, with foundational technique offered as a supplementary class but not as the brand category.

## Co-Founders

- **Billy Fajardo** — Co-founder and master instructor. World-champion social dancer with a lifetime of expertise; private lesson slots are limited and arranged on request.
- **Alex & Sue** — Co-founders and senior instructors. A professional dance couple training, competing, and performing across the United States since 2014.

## Faculty

- **Maria Fajardo** — Salsa and Bachata instructor; trained professionally under Billy Fajardo for the last decade.
- **Leah Duque** — Master instructor; extensive professional training in Ballet, Jazz, and Salsa.

## Class styles taught

- **Salsa** (On1 and On2, levels 1 through performance team)
- **Bachata** (sensual and traditional, all levels)
- **Latin Hustle** (the South Florida partner-dance specialty)
- **Cha-Cha** and **Merengue** (taught through the Saturday Latin Rhythms class)
- **Foundation Technique / Smooth Style** (Tuesday "Back to Basics" class)
- **Wedding Choreography** (custom first-dance routines)

## Weekly schedule

- **Monday 7 PM** — Beg. Salsa (Ladies Team, by audition)
- **Monday 8 PM** — Salsa On 1 (Levels 1 & 2)
- **Tuesday 7–8 PM** — Back to Basics (Foundation Technique)
- **Tuesday 8–9 PM** — Bachata (All Levels)
- **Wednesday 7–8 PM** — Salsa On 1 (Adv. Beg. Lvl 2 & 3)
- **Wednesday 8–9 PM** — Salsa On 1 (All Levels)
- **Thursday 7–8 PM** — Bachata (All Levels)
- **Thursday 8–9 PM** — Latin Hustle (All Levels)
- **Friday 7–8 PM** — Salsa On 2 (Intro to Basics)
- **Friday 8 PM** — Beg. Salsa (Ladies Team, by audition)
- **Saturday 10 AM** — Latin Rhythms (Salsa · Bachata · Merengue)
- **Saturday afternoon** — Open Floor (practice time)

## Pricing

- **Single drop-in:** $20
- **Two-A-Week monthly membership:** $120/mo
- **Unlimited monthly membership:** $185/mo
- **VIP monthly membership** (unlimited group + 4 private lessons): $425/mo
- **Team Membership** (audition only): $165/mo
- **Three-Lesson Private Package:** $270
- **Five-Lesson Private Package:** $420
- **Private lessons per hour:** Billy $125, Alex & Sue $105, Other instructors $95
- **Wedding packages:** starting from $420 (5-lesson custom choreography)
- **Competition coaching:** starting from $625 (custom programs)
- **One-time New Membership Registration fee:** $35 (includes complimentary t-shirt or shoe bag)

All memberships are billed via monthly auto-pay. Unused 2× / week classes do not carry over.

## Service area

Davie, Cooper City, Weston, Plantation, Pembroke Pines, Sunrise, Southwest Ranches, and Fort Lauderdale (Broward County, Florida).

## Booking

Online booking is handled through Square Appointments. Most students start with a single drop-in, then choose the membership or package that fits their cadence. Wedding and competition coaching are booked by quotation after a free 15-minute consultation.

- Contact: https://fajardoelite.com/contact.html
